news.title: Trump said his blockade would cause Iran's oil industry to 'explode' this week. Why that won't happen
news.summary: The U.S. and Iran are locked in a standoff that will only break when one side decides it can no longer tolerate the pain. Who will move is unclear.

news.title: Core inflation rate hit 3.2% in March as first-quarter growth disappointed at 2%
news.summary: The Iran war has created a new level of challenges for the Fed. Consumers faced escalating prices in March as the Iran war sent oil soaring.

news.title: Meta tanks 10%, Alphabet climbs 5% as each company raises capex spend
news.summary: Both Alphabet and Meta said they expect their capex to continue growing this year. Investors sent Alphabet's shares up, while Meta's stock slid.

news.title: Treasury Department announces new Series I bond rate of 4.26% for the next six months
news.summary: The U.S. Department of the Treasury has announced new Series I bond rates through October 2026. The new rates are based on a 10-year LIBOR rate.

news.title: Eli Lilly blows past quarterly estimates, hikes outlook as Zepbound and Mounjaro sales skyrocket
news.summary: Lilly raises its full-year sales outlook by $2 billion, and also raises its adjusted profit guidance. The drug company also raised its sales and profit guidance for the year.

news.title: Caterpillar handily beat Wall Street estimates — not for the first time
news.summary: The construction manufacturer reported a 38% rise in sales in its construction industries arm. The company also reported a rise in profits in the first quarter of 2014.

news.title: These stocks have been the biggest winners during the S&P 500’s best month since 2020
news.summary: The S&P 500 was up 9.6% for April, led by a gain of nearly 18% for the information technology sector.

news.title: Oil prices retreat after touching four-year high as traders focus on Iran developments
news.summary: Oil futures fall Thursday, reversing direction after reaching a four-year high. Oil futures fall on a report that President Donald Trump is considering escalating the war in Iran.

news.title: U.S. jobless claims sink to a 57-year low. Jobs aren’t easy to find — or lose.
news.summary: The U.S. jobs market is showing surprising staying power, a new report shows. The jobs report was released by the Bureau of Labor Statistics on Friday.

news.title: Royal Caribbean says people booking cruises aren’t so worried about Iran anymore
news.summary: Cruise bookings slowed in March and into April, but are now back above year-ago levels, Royal Caribbean says. Royal Caribbean: Cruise bookings slow in March, into April.
